summary: Ship an impact bridge dashboard linking impact ledger entries to backlog/receipt evidence with CI enforcement.

steps.title: Capture impact bridge requirements
steps.notes: Documented the impact ledger connections, CLI expectations, and receipt requirements from the queue brief.

steps.title: Design data model + CLI
steps.notes: Define ledger/backlog linkage schema, CLI flags, receipt formats, and CI gating strategy.

steps.title: Implement dashboard + guard
steps.notes: Build tooling, dashboards, receipt emitters, docs, tests, and CI enforcement.

checkpoint.description: Impact bridge CLI produces auditable receipts/dashboards and CI enforces impact references.
